name: Login System
description: A single-device login system with rate limiting, page-level access control, and full session enforcement. Accounts, sessions, and logs are stored in JSON files. One active session per user — logging in elsewhere terminates the previous session automatically.
features: Per-page permission control with wildcard support
Admin panel with CRUD and session management

name: Upload System
description: A self-hosted media hub with a public user portal, a password-protected admin panel, and individual user spaces for uploading and managing images, videos, and audio. Per-user storage quotas are strictly enforced. Supports search, sort, filter, and bulk deletion.
features: Admin panel with full user CRUD
Search, sort, and filter by name, size, or date

name: Backup System
description: A single-file PHP backup and restore utility. Creates timestamped snapshots of a live data directory, organised by year, month, day, and time. Supports full backup restore, single-file restore, and deletion at any directory level — all via AJAX with no page reloads.

name: Chat Platform
description: A self-hosted, AES-256-CBC encrypted chat platform. Rooms are created and accessed via 16-character hex IDs — no configuration required to spin up a new room. Messages update via 1-second polling. Users can edit or delete their own messages within a 5-minute window.
features: Room creation via hex ID — no setup

name: Simple Blog
description: A self-hosted blog platform with a custom PHP CMS. Posts are managed through a dedicated admin interface with full CRUD, automatic key generation, and multi-image support. The frontend uses a dark neon theme with glass-effect cards and an optional light mode.
features: Custom PHP CMS — no third-party dependency
Posts sorted latest-first with dynamic loading
Dark neon theme with light mode toggle

name: Simple Shop
description: A frontend e-commerce template with a WhatsApp-based checkout. Orders generate a pre-filled message with the customer's name, address, and cart — sent directly to your WhatsApp number. Persistent cart, dark/light theme, and zero monthly fees.
features: WhatsApp checkout — no payment gateway needed
Zero monthly fees — just host the files
